nasb.text: “Then you shall take the other ram, and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the ram.

esv.text: “You shall take the other ram, and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the ram,

cnv.text: “你要把另一隻公綿羊也牽來，亞倫和他兒子們要按手在這公綿羊的頭上。

ccb.text: “你要把另一只公绵羊牵来，亚伦父子们要把手按在羊头上，
